subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Find the survival function of a uniform distribution $X$ on the interval $[a, b]$.
explanation: The survival function is given by $S(x) = \begin{cases} 1 & \text{if } x \le a \\ \frac{b-x}{b-a} & \text{if } a < x < b \\ 0 & \text{if } x \ge b \end{cases}$.
